archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Premium Deep Navy variant)

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
Do NOT use Inter for any headings.
Use bold/black weight for strong contrast or light weight for elegance in headings.
Body text should be highly legible, max 40-60 words per block.
All font pairings must reflect authoritative, old-money finance yet modern precision.

layout_spacing.strategy: The 'Control Room' Mixed with Grid Borders
rules: Minimalist layout with generous whitespace (py-24, py-32 for sections).
Use 1px borders (border-white/10) to define grid items and cards. Use sharp corners (rounded-none).
Avoid heavy motion or parallax. Use subtle fade-ins (framer-motion).
No full-screen gradients. Use solid dark backgrounds with subtle grain/noise or abstract macro photography.

sections: Hero with a striking tagline connecting India, US, Europe, and UK
Mission narrative (strategic clarity, selectivity, senior-led execution)
CTAs ('Speak with an M&A advisor', 'Partner with us')
150-word firm history and philosophy emphasizing transparency and authenticity
3 Partner Biographies (80 words each, credible cross-border M&A backgrounds)

rules: 3-sentence jargon-free descriptions per service inside modular cards
Include a 3-phase execution process (Mandate Clarity, Selective Market Mapping, Execution Discipline)
Describe typical deal size ranges and client outcomes
Implement interactive filters for geography, sector, and deal size

features: 10 blog post titles around 2026 cross-border M&A trends with short summaries
Organize by topic clusters (e.g., 'India-US deals', 'Capital structuring signals')
SEO-friendly FAQs formatted in 40-60 word blocks
Form fields: Name, Email, Company/Fund Name, Region, Message
Office listings with addresses and phone numbers for India, US, Europe, and UK
Backend logic to store in database for future email notifications

ui_requirements: Position: Fixed bottom right corner (fixed bottom-6 right-6).
Interface: Minimalist floating button that opens a glassmorphism chat window (backdrop-blur-xl).
Behavior: Must proactively greet users and ask clarifying questions (business, sector, size, goals).
Disclaimer: Clearly display 'Educational guidance only. Not financial or legal advice.'

Suggested Prompts: 'Summarize the typical steps in a cross-border M&A process between India and the U.S.', 'Explain the difference between growth capital and private equity investment.', 'Highlight three considerations when structuring an M&A deal between a European investor and a UK target.'

backend_instructions.logic: Forward user messages and context to an OpenAI chat model. Instruct the AI to act as an M&A advisory assistant. Log transcripts securely to the database. Handle errors gracefully.
backend_instructions.llm_model: GPT-5.2 (Simulated via standard OpenAI API calls)

rules: Implement JSON-LD structured data (Organization, Services, Articles).
Ensure high color contrast ratios for typography.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive and key informational elements.

technical_architecture.frontend: React (Vite) + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI + Framer Motion. Use React Router for navigation.
technical_architecture.database: SQLite for storing blog posts, case studies, team bios, contact messages, and chat transcripts.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the complete hybrid_fullstack application based on these design guidelines.
Create all 7 requested frontend pages using the specified typography and color variables.
Implement the FastAPI backend with an `/api/chat` route that communicates with OpenAI.
Set up the SQLite database schema and provide endpoints for saving contact form submissions and logging chat transcripts.
Ensure the Services page uses modular cards and outlines the 3-phase execution process.
Ensure the Investments page includes the specified interactive filters.
Generate the 10 blog posts and FAQs for the Insights page as requested.
Embed the JSON-LD schemas in the document heads.
Produce a comprehensive README explaining how to run the project locally, set up the database, and configure the OpenAI API key.
